problem id: aea08eb0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11101000 -> 00110100
  10011011 -> 10010101
  10101000 -> 00010100
  11100001 -> 01111000
  01010100 -> 10001010
  01111010 -> 11101101
  10011001 -> 10000100
  01010001 -> 10100000

query: 00111111
predicted answer: 11100111
